name: CanisPro PHP 8.4 Env
postCreateCommand: apt-get update && apt-get install -y default-mysql-server && service mysql start && mysql -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS canispro_bdd; CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS 'canispro'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY 'Trasio2026.'; GRANT ALL ON canispro_bdd.* TO 'canispro'@'localhost';" && composer install && php bin/console doctrine:migrations:migrate --no-interaction
